name: support_catalog_good
note: A deliberate catalog. Each intent maps to exactly one tool, each tool has a single effect level, descriptions are precise, and every write or destructive tool is gated by the permission control. The right tool for a read is obvious, and a high-impact action cannot run without passing the gate.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Return the current status of one order. Read only.

tools.name: get_account_status
tools.description: Return the current status of one account. Read only.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel one order. Requires authorization and confirmation.

tools.name: refund_order
tools.description: Issue a refund for one order. Requires authorization and confirmation.

tools.name: close_account
tools.description: Permanently close one account. Requires authorization and confirmation.
